SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTER, RONALD D IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RICHMOND MULTI SERVICES INC PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT HE WAS HAVING A DIFFICULT DAY BUT HE FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT OWES HIM DAMAGE FOR TURNING OFF THE COMPUTER AND REMOVING HIM AFTER THE CENTER HAD CLOSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00-(WAIVED) SERVED APR-23-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMOND MULTI SERVICES INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2025 JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RONALD D CARTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHMOND MULTI SERVICES INC. (MICHELE ALEXIA) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
